parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While on, the receives information from joysticks and gamepads. While Off, no updating occurs.

parameters.name: source
parameters.label: Joystick Source
parameters.description: This menu will list up to 4 game controllers currently attached to the computer presented to the operating system as Player 1 through Player 4. The selected game controller is the one the reads data f

parameters.name: axisrange
parameters.label: Axis Range
parameters.description: Select between and axis range of 0 to 1 or -1 to 1.

parameters.name: xaxis
parameters.label: X Axis
parameters.description: The name of the channel that records the X-axis position of the game controller.

parameters.name: yaxis
parameters.label: Y Axis
parameters.description: The name of the channel that records the Y-axis position of the game controller.

parameters.name: yaxisinvert
parameters.label: Invert Y Axis
parameters.description: Inverts the Y axis.

parameters.name: zaxis
parameters.label: Z Axis
parameters.description: The name of the channel that records the Z-axis position of the game controller.

parameters.name: xrot
parameters.label: X Rotation
parameters.description: The names of the channels that record the X-rotation axis position of the game controller.

parameters.name: yrot
parameters.label: Y Rotation
parameters.description: The names of the channels that record the Y-rotation axis position of the game controller.

parameters.name: yrotinvert
parameters.label: Invert Y Rotation
parameters.description: Invert the rotation direction around the Y axis.

parameters.name: zrot
parameters.label: Z Rotation
parameters.description: The names of the channels that record the Z-rotation axis position of the game controller.

parameters.name: slider0
parameters.label: Slider 1
parameters.description: The name of the channel that records the position of the first slider on the game controller.

parameters.name: slider1
parameters.label: Slider 2
parameters.description: The name of the channel that records the position of the second slider on the game controller.

parameters.name: buttonarray
parameters.label: Button Array
parameters.description: The names of the channels for the buttons on the game controller. This can handle up to 32 buttons.

parameters.name: povarrray
parameters.label: POV Hat Array
parameters.description: The names of the channels for the POV Hats. This can handle up to 4 POV Hats. The channels a POV hat is split up into are

parameters.name: connected
parameters.label: Connected
parameters.description: Creates a channel that reports the state of connection of the controller.

parameters.name: axisdeadzone
parameters.label: Axis Dead Zone
parameters.description: This value defines how much of the area in the center of the joystick is considered 'dead zone'. When a joystick axis is in this dead zone it is considered to be centered. This value applies to all no

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the channels, in samples per second.

parameters.name: left
parameters.label: Extend Left
parameters.description: The left extend conditions (before range).

parameters.name: right
parameters.label: Extend Right
parameters.description: The right extend conditions (after range).

parameters.name: defval
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: The value used for the Default Value extend condition.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
